title: Wooden Jetpack
description: simple well made jetpack. No tiers, no energy, just a great easy to use early game flight jetpack.
body:
This mods adds a single item. A wooden jet pack. Its an easy to craft item that provides temporary flight. The item is one time use and cannot be repaired or enchanted.

 



There are no tiers, there is no energy, just a single well made jetpack for early game travel.
